page_content:
Formerly: HISP619N.

HISP690 Historic Preservation Professional Practice (2 Credits) Students explore management and practice issues in the historic preservation field. Topics include: project management, budgeting, personnel, and grantsmanship. Each topic will be considered in the three main areas of practice - government agencies, non-profits, and for profit companies. Outside speakers from these various practice environments will present on their area of specialization.
